title: lysimachia glutinosa
intro: Lysimachia glutinosa, also known as sticky or cleaver lythrum, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Primulaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Lysimachia glutinosa include its ability to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in reducing fever and promoting wound healing. Lysimachia glutinosa is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts can also be found in some herbal supplements, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
